summary: Matched and linked the Kyasarin egg item translation unit by moving itkyasarinegg.c from NonMatching to Matching, adding item state/data definitions, typed Kyasarin egg item vars/attributes, headers, and several newly matched item behavior callbacks.

key_files.role: Build configuration changed itkyasarinegg.c from NonMatching to Matching.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py hunk changes Object(NonMatching, "melee/it/items/itkyasarinegg.c") to Object(Matching, "melee/it/items/itkyasarinegg.c")

key_files.role: Primary matched source: added ItemStateTable, spawn/setup behavior, physics/collision/animation callbacks, shared damage inline, and damage/reflection callback wrappers.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itkyasarinegg.c adds ItemStateTable it_803F9328
raw_diff: itkyasarinegg.c adds it_802EFA44, it_802EFB0C, it_802EFCC0, it_802EFD84, it_damage_inline, it_2725_Logic28_* callbacks, it_802F022C
text_corpus: decomp-dev bot reports 11 new matches in main/melee/it/items/itkyasarinegg

key_files.role: Added Kyasarin egg item variable and special-attribute structs.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itCommonItems.h adds itKyasarinEgg_ItemVars and itKyasarinEggAttributes

key_files.role: Connected the new Kyasarin egg item vars into Item.xDD4_itemVar union.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: types.h adds itKyasarinEgg_ItemVars kyasarinEgg to struct Item union

key_files.role: Updated exported prototypes and return types for Kyasarin egg functions.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itkyasarinegg.h adds prototypes for it_802EFA44, it_802EFB0C, it_802EFD84 and updates return types for collision/anim functions

what_changed: Marked melee/it/items/itkyasarinegg.c as Matching in configure.py.
Added Kyasarin egg typed item vars and attributes, including kyasarinEgg union access under Item.xDD4_itemVar.
Added the Kyasarin egg item state table it_803F9328 and multiple item behavior functions in itkyasarinegg.c.
Used a shared inline helper, it_damage_inline, for several damage/contact callbacks that return the same behavior.
Updated itkyasarinegg.h prototypes to expose newly added functions and align return types.
Bot report records 11 new matches, including five +244 byte callbacks, several helper functions, .data, and .sdata2 for main/melee/it/items/itkyasarinegg.

smart_moves.text: Added a dedicated kyasarinEgg union arm and struct before accessing xDD4 item variables, avoiding raw offset use for the recovered item-local state.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itCommonItems.h adds itKyasarinEgg_ItemVars
raw_diff: types.h adds kyasarinEgg union member
raw_diff: itkyasarinegg.c uses egg->xDD4_itemVar.kyasarinEgg.x20

smart_moves.text: Factored repeated damage/contact behavior into it_damage_inline and used thin wrappers for DmgDealt, Clanked, HitShield, Reflected, and it_802F022C.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: it_damage_inline added
raw_diff: it_2725_Logic28_DmgDealt, Clanked, HitShield, Reflected, and it_802F022C call it_damage_inline

smart_moves.text: Kept unproven helper symbols address-style while using semantic names where already present for Logic28 callbacks.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: address-style names it_802EFA44, it_802EFB0C, it_802EFCC0, it_802EFD84 remain
raw_diff: semantic names itKyasarinEgg_Logic28_PickedUp/Dropped/Thrown remain

decomp_lessons.lesson: When multiple item interaction callbacks compile to the same body, a shared inline helper plus small callback wrappers can match repeated functions while keeping the repeated logic centralized.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: inline bool it_damage_inline(Item_GObj* gobj)
raw_diff: five wrappers use PAD_STACK(0x8) and return it_damage_inline(gobj)
text_corpus: bot reports five +244 byte callback matches at 100.00%

decomp_lessons.lesson: Recovering an item-specific ItemVars union arm can make item state accesses reviewable and typed during matching.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itCommonItems.h adds itKyasarinEgg_ItemVars
raw_diff: types.h adds kyasarinEgg union member
raw_diff: itkyasarinegg.c accesses kyasarinEgg.x20

naming_conventions.convention: Use semantic item callback names where role is already established, such as itKyasarinEgg_Logic28_PickedUp, Dropped, Thrown, and ShieldBounced.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itkyasarinegg.c and itkyasarinegg.h retain/add itKyasarinEgg_Logic28_* names

naming_conventions.convention: Keep address-style names for functions whose semantics are not established by the PR, such as it_802EFA44, it_802EFB0C, it_802EFCC0, it_802EFD84, and it_802F022C.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: newly added prototypes and definitions use address-style names for these helpers

naming_conventions.convention: Use item-specific typed names for recovered structs and union arms: itKyasarinEgg_ItemVars, itKyasarinEggAttributes, and kyasarinEgg.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itCommonItems.h adds itKyasarinEgg_ItemVars and itKyasarinEggAttributes
raw_diff: types.h adds kyasarinEgg

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used PAD_STACK in narrow locations: PAD_STACK(0x50) in it_802EFA44 and PAD_STACK(0x8) in repeated damage/contact wrappers.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: it_802EFA44 contains PAD_STACK(0x50)
raw_diff: it_2725_Logic28_DmgDealt, Clanked, HitShield, Reflected, and it_802F022C contain PAD_STACK(0x8)
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: The bot report supports the resulting matches, but the PR has no body explaining why the stack padding was required.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Changed function return types in the header/source to match callback usage, including int collision callbacks and bool animation/contact callbacks.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itkyasarinegg.h changes itKyasarinegg_UnkMotion1_Coll to int
raw_diff: itkyasarinegg.h changes itKyasarinegg_UnkMotion3_Coll to int
raw_diff: itkyasarinegg.h changes itKyasarinegg_UnkMotion4_Anim to bool

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Added required includes for newly referenced APIs: efsync, mpcoll, mplib, and baselib/random.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itkyasarinegg.c adds #include "ef/efsync.h"
raw_diff: itkyasarinegg.c adds #include "mp/mpcoll.h"
raw_diff: itkyasarinegg.c adds #include "mp/mplib.h"
raw_diff: itkyasarinegg.c adds #include <baselib/random.h>

rejection_notes: Do not promote PAD_STACK use in this PR as an accepted general tactic without additional objdiff/build rationale; the PR only shows its presence and a bot match report.
Do not infer semantic meanings for address-style functions such as it_802EFA44 or it_802F022C beyond their observed use in this diff.
Do not treat the inline helper name it_damage_inline as a proven original-source name; it is a source-level matching construct shown by this PR.
